query: ( "heat warning system" OR "heat alert system" OR "heat early warning" OR "extreme heat intervention" OR "heat action plan" OR "heat-health action plan" OR "forecast-based financing" OR "anticipatory action" OR "early warning early action" OR "urban heat governance" OR "thermal stress prevention" OR "heat vulnerability index" OR "climate services" OR "weather forecast alert" ) AND ( "excess mortality" OR "heat-related mortality" OR "attributable fraction" OR "mortality displacement" OR "harvesting effect" OR "heat-related death" OR "summer mortality" OR "thermoregulation failure" OR "heat exposure" OR "all-cause mortality" ) AND ( "causal inference" OR "counterfactual" OR "quasi-experimental" OR "stepped wedge" OR "synthetic control" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "interrupted time series" OR "randomized controlled trial" OR "epidemiological surveillance" OR "environmental epidemiology" OR "population-level" OR "impact evaluation" )
